title: Scoruluce Smooth Pickaxs (Variation 2)
description: a pickaxe edit of classic faithfull 32x32
body:
# **Scoruluce Smooth Pickaxes (Variation 2) Resource Pack (Beta)**

Scoruluce Smooth Pickaxes (Variation 2) is a resource pack designed to enhance the pickaxes from the [Faithful Classic 32x32](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-faithful-32x-programmer-art) pack by completely redesigning the pickaxe heads and introducing two different handle variations. This pack aims to provide a high level of detail with color gradients and intricate designs for each pickaxe. 

**A versions of each tool to match the overall aesthetics in one and only pack is planed in the future.**

![Texture of all the pickaxes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ee7119d50d11c0902ebeb65bc044c54761f7ab6.png)

This pack is currently in beta, and while I've put a lot of effort into making it, there may still be some bugs. I rely on our community to help me improve the pack by reporting any issues and suggesting tweaks via my GitHub page.

**Features:**
- Completely redesigned pickaxe from the [Faithful Classic 32x32](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-faithful-32x-programmer-art) pack.
- Two different handle variations for each pickaxe. (Different modrinth pages)
- Detailed textures.

# **How to Contribute:**
Found a bug or have an idea for improvement? Please report it on my GitHub page. Your contributions help me make this pack better for everyone!

Thank you for trying out Scoruluce Smooth Pickaxes. I hope you enjoy it.
